# FLYwithMIKI Paragliding School

> FLYwithMIKI is a premium, eco-friendly paragliding school in Central Switzerland (Kriens, Canton of Lucerne), founded by Miklós Mohos. It offers full pilot training to the Swiss SHV/IPPI4 licence, tandem flights, and equipment sales, with instruction in English, German and Hungarian. Teaching is in small groups (3-8 students per instructor) with electric-vehicle transport and tree planting after every course.

## Key facts

- Name: FLYwithMIKI Paragliding School (Gleitschirmschule)
- Founder / head instructor: Miklós Mohos (PhD)
- Location: Kriens 6010, Canton of Lucerne, Central Switzerland
- Coordinates: 47.0358577, 8.2584166
- Areas served: Luzern, Zug, Zürich, Engelberg, Emmetten, Wolfenschiessen, and Central Switzerland (cantons LU, ZG, SZ, NW, OW, UR) plus Valais
- Languages of instruction: English, German, Hungarian
- Google rating: 4.9 / 5 (46 reviews)
- Certification: Swiss Hang Gliding Association (SHV/FSVL), trains to IPPI4 pilot licence
- Contact: +41 77 976 6164 (WhatsApp), info@flywithmiki.com
- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q136536762

## What makes it distinctive

- Small groups (3-8 students per instructor) — close to private coaching
- Eco-friendly: electric-vehicle transport and tree planting after every course
- FlightDeck app for digital flight book, progress tracking and GPS tracking
- Slow-motion video analysis of each flight and integrated mental training
- Flexible scheduling suited to working professionals

## Pricing (CHF)

- Tandem flight: from CHF 185
- Taster / ground-handling day: from CHF 600
- Basic Training: CHF 1,900
- High Flight Course: CHF 4,400 (60 high-altitude flights, up to 6 months)
- Full Training (beginner to licence): CHF 4,500
- Equipment package: from CHF 5,000
